ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status
Off Calendar Jun-21-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Lillian Ng appearing for trustee. Arron Kamins appearing for Mr. Quok. Ms. Ng has not spoken to her client regarding if the loan is secured. Mr. Quok is objecting to the high interest rate of 9%. Court set the interest rate at 8%. Order signed. Court is surcharging Mr. Quok the sum of $131,520.00 without interest. Ms. Ng will prepare an order. Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR 11722. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: Mizota.

MINI MINUTES: 10:30 AM, NO APPEARENCE HAS BEEN MADE BY ATTORNEY OR PETITIONER.
NOTICE TO BE GIVEN TO ATTORNEY AND PETITIONER THAT THE CASE WAS CONTINUED UNTIL 4/26/06.
MR. QUOK WILL BE HELD IN CONTEMPT IF HE DOES NOT APPEAR.
JUDGE:J. DEARMAN, CLERK:L. DOTSON, RPTR. K. BERSAMIN, CSR 11722

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status
Off Calendar Mar-22-2006 Continued To Apr-19-06 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Lillian Ng appearing for trustee. Arron Kamins appearing for Mr. Quok. Mr. Quok does not want to rent the property. He wants the property sold. Court is concerned about Mr. Quok not filing an accoounting. Court is not ordering the property sold. The trustee is to repair the property and rent it. Court is ordering Mr. Quok to file an accoounting according to court rules on or before 4/19. If accounting is not filed, court will find him in contempt. Ms. Ng to prepare an order. Matter is continued to 4/19. Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Teanna L. Ward CSR#11918. Clerk: Ella Yip.
